{"content": "     1|"""Activity listing and task-comment feed endpoints."""
     2|
     3|from __future__ import annotations
     4|
     5|import asyncio
     6|import json
     7|from collections import deque
     8|from datetime import UTC, datetime
     9|from typing import TYPE_CHECKING, Any
    10|from uuid import UUID
    11|
    12|from fastapi import APIRouter, Depends, HTTPException, Query, Request, status
    13|from sqlalchemy import and_, asc, desc, func, or_
    14|from sqlmodel import col, select
    15|from sse_starlette.sse import EventSourceResponse
    16|
    17|from app.api.deps import ActorContext, require_org_member, require_user_or_agent
    18|from app.core.time import utcnow
    19|from app.db.pagination import paginate
    20|from app.db.session import async_session_maker, get_session
    21|from app.models.activity_events import ActivityEvent
    22|from app.models.agents import Agent
    23|from app.models.boards import Board
    24|from app.models.tasks import Task
    25|from app.schemas.activity_events import ActivityEventRead, ActivityTaskCommentFeedItemRead
    26|from app.schemas.pagination import DefaultLimitOffsetPage
    27|from app.services.organizations import (
    28|    OrganizationContext,
    29|    get_active_membership,
    30|    list_accessible_board_ids,
    31|)
    32|
    33|if TYPE_CHECKING:
    34|    from collections.abc import AsyncIterator, Sequence
    35|
    36|    from fastapi_pagination.limit_offset import LimitOffsetPage
    37|    from sqlmodel.ext.asyncio.session import AsyncSession
    38|
    39|router = APIRouter(prefix="/activity", tags=["activity"])
    40|
    41|SSE_SEEN_MAX = 2000
    42|STREAM_POLL_SECONDS = 2
    43|TASK_COMMENT_ROW_LEN = 4
    44|SESSION_DEP = Depends(get_session)
    45|ACTOR_DEP = Depends(require_user_or_agent)
    46|ORG_MEMBER_DEP = Depends(require_org_member)
    47|BOARD_ID_QUERY = Query(default=None)
    48|SINCE_QUERY = Query(default=None)
    49|_RUNTIME_TYPE_REFERENCES = (UUID,)
    50|
    51|
    52|def _parse_since(value: str | None) -> datetime | None:
    53|    if not value:
    54|        return None
    55|    normalized = value.strip()
    56|    if not normalized:
    57|        return None
    58|    normalized = normalized.replace("Z", "+00:00")
    59|    try:
    60|        parsed = datetime.fromisoformat(normalized)
    61|    except ValueError:
    62|        return None
    63|    if parsed.tzinfo is not None:
    64|        return parsed.astimezone(UTC).replace(tzinfo=None)
    65|    return parsed
    66|
    67|
    68|def _agent_role(agent: Agent | None) -> str | None:
    69|    if agent is None:
    70|        return None
    71|    profile = agent.identity_profile
    72|    if not isinstance(profile, dict):
    73|        return None
    74|    raw = profile.get("role")
    75|    if isinstance(raw, str):
    76|        role = raw.strip()
    77|        return role or None
    78|    return None
    79|
    80|
    81|def _build_activity_route(
    82|    *,
    83|    event: ActivityEvent,
    84|    board_id: UUID | None,
    85|) -> tuple[str, dict[str, str]]:
    86|    if board_id is not None:
    87|        board_id_str = str(board_id)
    88|        board_params = {"boardId": board_id_str}
    89|
    90|        if event.event_type == "task.comment" and event.task_id is not None:
    91|            return (
    92|                "board",
    93|                {
    94|                    **board_params,
    95|                    "taskId": str(event.task_id),
    96|                    "commentId": str(event.id),
    97|                },
    98|            )
    99|
   100|        if event.event_type.startswith("approval."):
   101|            return ("board.approvals", board_params)
   102|
   103|        if event.event_type.startswith("board."):
   104|            return ("board", {**board_params, "panel": "chat"})
   105|
   106|        if event.task_id is not None:
   107|            return ("board", {**board_params, "taskId": str(event.task_id)})
   108|
   109|        return ("board", board_params)
   110|
   111|    fallback_params = {
   112|        "eventId": str(event.id),
   113|        "eventType": event.event_type,
   114|        "createdAt": event.created_at.isoformat(),
   115|    }
   116|    if event.task_id is not None:
   117|        fallback_params["taskId"] = str(event.task_id)
   118|    return ("activity", fallback_params)
   119|
   120|
   121|def _feed_item(
   122|    event: ActivityEvent,
   123|    task: Task,
   124|    board: Board,
   125|    agent: Agent | None,
   126|) -> ActivityTaskCommentFeedItemRead:
   127|    return ActivityTaskCommentFeedItemRead(
   128|        id=event.id,
   129|        created_at=event.created_at,
   130|        message=event.message,
   131|        agent_id=event.agent_id,
   132|        agent_name=agent.name if agent else None,
   133|        agent_role=_agent_role(agent),
   134|        task_id=task.id,
   135|        task_title=task.title,
   136|        board_id=board.id,
   137|        board_name=board.name,
   138|    )
   139|
   140|
   141|def _coerce_task_comment_rows(
   142|    items: Sequence[Any],
   143|) -> list[tuple[ActivityEvent, Task, Board, Agent | None]]:
   144|    rows: list[tuple[ActivityEvent, Task, Board, Agent | None]] = []
   145|    for item in items:
   146|        first: Any
   147|        second: Any
   148|        third: Any
   149|        fourth: Any
   150|
   151|        if isinstance(item, tuple):
   152|            if len(item) != TASK_COMMENT_ROW_LEN:
   153|                msg = "Expected (ActivityEvent, Task, Board, Agent | None) rows"
   154|                raise TypeError(msg)
   155|            first, second, third, fourth = item
   156|        else:
   157|            try:
   158|                row_len = len(item)
   159|                first = item[0]
   160|                second = item[1]
   161|                third = item[2]
   162|                fourth = item[3]
   163|            except (IndexError, KeyError, TypeError):
   164|                msg = "Expected (ActivityEvent, Task, Board, Agent | None) rows"
   165|                raise TypeError(msg) from None
   166|            if row_len != TASK_COMMENT_ROW_LEN:
   167|                msg = "Expected (ActivityEvent, Task, Board, Agent | None) rows"
   168|                raise TypeError(msg)
   169|
   170|        if (
   171|            isinstance(first, ActivityEvent)
   172|            and isinstance(second, Task)
   173|            and isinstance(third, Board)
   174|            and (isinstance(fourth, Agent) or fourth is None)
   175|        ):
   176|            rows.append((first, second, third, fourth))
   177|            continue
   178|
   179|        msg = "Expected (ActivityEvent, Task, Board, Agent | None) rows"
   180|        raise TypeError(msg)
   181|    return rows
   182|
   183|
   184|def _coerce_activity_rows(
   185|    items: Sequence[Any],
   186|) -> list[tuple[ActivityEvent, UUID | None, UUID | None]]:
   187|    rows: list[tuple[ActivityEvent, UUID | None, UUID | None]] = []
   188|    for item in items:
   189|        first: Any
   190|        second: Any
   191|        third: Any
   192|
   193|        if isinstance(item, tuple):
   194|            if len(item) != 3:
   195|                msg = "Expected (ActivityEvent, event_board_id, task_board_id) rows"
   196|                raise TypeError(msg)
   197|            first, second, third = item
   198|        else:
   199|            try:
   200|                row_len = len(item)
   201|                first = item[0]
   202|                second = item[1]
   203|                third = item[2]
   204|            except (IndexError, KeyError, TypeError):
   205|                msg = "Expected (ActivityEvent, event_board_id, task_board_id) rows"
   206|                raise TypeError(msg) from None
   207|            if row_len != 3:
   208|                msg = "Expected (ActivityEvent, event_board_id, task_board_id) rows"
   209|                raise TypeError(msg)
   210|
   211|        if not isinstance(first, ActivityEvent):
   212|            msg = "Expected (ActivityEvent, event_board_id, task_board_id) rows"
   213|            raise TypeError(msg)
   214|        if second is not None and not isinstance(second, UUID):
   215|            msg = "Expected (ActivityEvent, event_board_id, task_board_id) rows"
   216|            raise TypeError(msg)
   217|        if third is not None and not isinstance(third, UUID):
   218|            msg = "Expected (ActivityEvent, event_board_id, task_board_id) rows"
   219|            raise TypeError(msg)
   220|        rows.append((first, second, third))
   221|    return rows
   222|
   223|
   224|async def _fetch_task_comment_events(
   225|    session: AsyncSession,
   226|    since: datetime,
   227|    *,
   228|    board_id: UUID | None = None,
   229|) -> Sequence[tuple[ActivityEvent, Task, Board, Agent | None]]:
   230|    statement = (
   231|        select(ActivityEvent, Task, Board, Agent)
   232|        .join(Task, col(ActivityEvent.task_id) == col(Task.id))
   233|        .join(Board, col(Task.board_id) == col(Board.id))
   234|        .outerjoin(Agent, col(ActivityEvent.agent_id) == col(Agent.id))
   235|        .where(col(ActivityEvent.event_type) == "task.comment")
   236|        .where(col(ActivityEvent.created_at) >= since)
   237|        .where(func.length(func.trim(col(ActivityEvent.message))) > 0)
   238|        .order_by(asc(col(ActivityEvent.created_at)))
   239|    )
   240|    if board_id is not None:
   241|        statement = statement.where(col(Task.board_id) == board_id)
   242|    return _coerce_task_comment_rows(list(await session.exec(statement)))
   243|
   244|
   245|@router.get("", response_model=DefaultLimitOffsetPage[ActivityEventRead])
   246|async def list_activity(
   247|    session: AsyncSession = SESSION_DEP,
   248|    actor: ActorContext = ACTOR_DEP,
   249|) -> LimitOffsetPage[ActivityEventRead]:
   250|    """List activity events visible to the calling actor."""
   251|    statement: Any = select(
   252|        ActivityEvent,
   253|        col(ActivityEvent.board_id).label("event_board_id"),
   254|        col(Task.board_id).label("task_board_id"),
   255|    ).outerjoin(Task, col(ActivityEvent.task_id) == col(Task.id))
   256|    if actor.actor_type == "agent" and actor.agent:
   257|        statement = statement.where(col(ActivityEvent.agent_id) == actor.agent.id)
   258|    elif actor.actor_type == "user" and actor.user:
   259|        member = await get_active_membership(session, actor.user)
   260|        if member is None:
   261|            raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_403_FORBIDDEN)
   262|        board_ids = await list_accessible_board_ids(session, member=member, write=False)
   263|        if not board_ids:
   264|            statement = statement.where(col(ActivityEvent.id).is_(None))
   265|        else:
   266|            statement = statement.where(
   267|                or_(
   268|                    col(ActivityEvent.board_id).in_(board_ids),
   269|                    and_(
   270|                        col(ActivityEvent.board_id).is_(None),
   271|                        col(Task.board_id).in_(board_ids),
   272|                    ),
   273|                ),
   274|            )
   275|    statement = statement.order_by(desc(col(ActivityEvent.created_at)))
   276|
   277|    def _transform(items: Sequence[Any]) -> Sequence[Any]:
   278|        rows = _coerce_activity_rows(items)
   279|        events: list[ActivityEventRead] = []
   280|        for event, event_board_id, task_board_id in rows:
   281|            payload = ActivityEventRead.model_validate(event, from_attributes=True)
   282|            resolved_board_id = event_board_id or task_board_id
   283|            payload.board_id = resolved_board_id
   284|            route_name, route_params = _build_activity_route(
   285|                event=event,
   286|                board_id=resolved_board_id,
   287|            )
   288|            payload.route_name = route_name
   289|            payload.route_params = route_params
   290|            events.append(payload)
   291|        return events
   292|
   293|    return await paginate(session, statement, transformer=_transform)
   294|
   295|
   296|@router.get(
   297|    "/task-comments",
   298|    response_model=DefaultLimitOffsetPage[ActivityTaskCommentFeedItemRead],
   299|)
   300|async def list_task_comment_feed(
   301|    board_id: UUID | None = BOARD_ID_QUERY,
   302|    session: AsyncSession = SESSION_DEP,
   303|    ctx: OrganizationContext = ORG_MEMBER_DEP,
   304|) -> LimitOffsetPage[ActivityTaskCommentFeedItemRead]:
   305|    """List task-comment feed items for accessible boards."""
   306|    statement = (
   307|        select(ActivityEvent, Task, Board, Agent)
   308|        .join(Task, col(ActivityEvent.task_id) == col(Task.id))
   309|        .join(Board, col(Task.board_id) == col(Board.id))
   310|        .outerjoin(Agent, col(ActivityEvent.agent_id) == col(Agent.id))
   311|        .where(col(ActivityEvent.event_type) == "task.comment")
   312|        .where(func.length(func.trim(col(ActivityEvent.message))) > 0)
   313|        .order_by(desc(col(ActivityEvent.created_at)))
   314|    )
   315|    board_ids = await list_accessible_board_ids(session, member=ctx.member, write=False)
   316|    if board_id is not None:
   317|        if board_id not in set(board_ids):
   318|            raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_403_FORBIDDEN)
   319|        statement = statement.where(col(Task.board_id) == board_id)
   320|    elif board_ids:
   321|        statement = statement.where(col(Task.board_id).in_(board_ids))
   322|    else:
   323|        statement = statement.where(col(Task.id).is_(None))
   324|
   325|    def _transform(items: Sequence[Any]) -> Sequence[Any]:
   326|        rows = _coerce_task_comment_rows(items)
   327|        return [_feed_item(event, task, board, agent) for event, task, board, agent in rows]
   328|
   329|    return await paginate(session, statement, transformer=_transform)
   330|
   331|
   332|@router.get("/task-comments/stream")
   333|async def stream_task_comment_feed(
   334|    request: Request,
   335|    board_id: UUID | None = BOARD_ID_QUERY,
   336|    since: str | None = SINCE_QUERY,
   337|    db_session: AsyncSession = SESSION_DEP,
   338|    ctx: OrganizationContext = ORG_MEMBER_DEP,
   339|) -> EventSourceResponse:
   340|    """Stream task-comment events for accessible boards."""
   341|    since_dt = _parse_since(since) or utcnow()
   342|    board_ids = await list_accessible_board_ids(
   343|        db_session,
   344|        member=ctx.member,
   345|        write=False,
   346|    )
   347|    allowed_ids = set(board_ids)
   348|    if board_id is not None and board_id not in allowed_ids:
   349|        raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_403_FORBIDDEN)
   350|    seen_ids: set[UUID] = set()
   351|    seen_queue: deque[UUID] = deque()
   352|
   353|    async def event_generator() -> AsyncIterator[dict[str, str]]:
   354|        last_seen = since_dt
   355|        while True:
   356|            if await request.is_disconnected():
   357|                break
   358|            async with async_session_maker() as stream_session:
   359|                if board_id is not None:
   360|                    rows = await _fetch_task_comment_events(
   361|                        stream_session,
   362|                        last_seen,
   363|                        board_id=board_id,
   364|                    )
   365|                elif allowed_ids:
   366|                    rows = await _fetch_task_comment_events(stream_session, last_seen)
   367|                    rows = [row for row in rows if row[1].board_id in allowed_ids]
   368|                else:
   369|                    rows = []
   370|            for event, task, board, agent in rows:
   371|                event_id = event.id
   372|                if event_id in seen_ids:
   373|                    continue
   374|                seen_ids.add(event_id)
   375|                seen_queue.append(event_id)
   376|                if len(seen_queue) > SSE_SEEN_MAX:
   377|                    oldest = seen_queue.popleft()
   378|                    seen_ids.discard(oldest)
   379|                last_seen = max(event.created_at, last_seen)
   380|                payload = {
   381|                    "comment": _feed_item(
   382|                        event,
   383|                        task,
   384|                        board,
   385|                        agent,
   386|                    ).model_dump(mode="json"),
   387|                }
   388|                yield {"event": "comment", "data": json.dumps(payload)}
   389|            await asyncio.sleep(STREAM_POLL_SECONDS)
   390|
   391|    return EventSourceResponse(event_generator(), ping=15)

{"content": "     1|"""Dashboard metric aggregation endpoints."""

    16|from app.api.deps import require_org_member

    18|from app.db.session import get_session
    19|from app.models.activity_events import ActivityEvent

    24|from app.schemas.metrics import (
    25|    DashboardBucketKey,
    26|    DashboardKpis,
    27|    DashboardMetrics,
    28|    DashboardPendingApproval,
    29|    DashboardPendingApprovals,

    39|
    40|router = APIRouter(prefix="/metrics", tags=["metrics"])
    41|
    42|ERROR_EVENT_PATTERN = "%failed"
    43|_RUNTIME_TYPE_REFERENCES = (UUID, AsyncSession)
    44|RANGE_QUERY = Query(default="24h")
    45|BOARD_ID_QUERY = Query(default=None)
    46|GROUP_ID_QUERY = Query(default=None)
    47|SESSION_DEP = Depends(get_session)
    48|ORG_MEMBER_DEP = Depends(require_org_member)
    49|
    50|
    51|@dataclass(frozen=True)
    52|class RangeSpec:
    53|    """Resolved time-range specification for metric aggregation."""
    54|
    55|    key: DashboardRangeKey
    56|    start: datetime
    57|    end: datetime
    58|    bucket: DashboardBucketKey
    59|    duration: timedelta
    60|
    61|
    62|def _resolve_range(range_key: DashboardRangeKey) -> RangeSpec:
    63|    now = utcnow()
    64|    specs: dict[DashboardRangeKey, tuple[timedelta, DashboardBucketKey]] = {
    65|        "24h": (timedelta(hours=24), "hour"),
    66|        "3d": (timedelta(days=3), "day"),
    67|        "7d": (timedelta(days=7), "day"),
    68|        "14d": (timedelta(days=14), "day"),
    69|        "1m": (timedelta(days=30), "day"),
    70|        "3m": (timedelta(days=90), "week"),
    71|        "6m": (timedelta(days=180), "week"),
    72|        "1y": (timedelta(days=365), "month"),
    73|    }
    74|    duration, bucket = specs[range_key]
    75|    return RangeSpec(
    76|        key=range_key,
    77|        start=now - duration,
    78|        end=now,
    79|        bucket=bucket,
    80|        duration=duration,
    81|    )
    82|
    83|
    84|def _comparison_range(range_spec: RangeSpec) -> RangeSpec:
    85|    return RangeSpec(
    86|        key=range_spec.key,
    87|        start=range_spec.start - range_spec.duration,
    88|        end=range_spec.end - range_spec.duration,
    89|        bucket=range_spec.bucket,
    90|        duration=range_spec.duration,
    91|    )
    92|
    93|
    94|def _bucket_start(value: datetime, bucket: DashboardBucketKey) -> datetime:
    95|    normalized = value.replace(hour=0, minute=0, second=0, microsecond=0)
    96|    if bucket == "month":
    97|        return normalized.replace(day=1)
    98|    if bucket == "week":
    99|        return normalized - timedelta(days=normalized.weekday())
   100|    if bucket == "day":
   101|        return normalized
   102|    return value.replace(minute=0, second=0, microsecond=0)
   103|
   104|
   105|def _next_bucket(cursor: datetime, bucket: DashboardBucketKey) -> datetime:
   106|    if bucket == "hour":
   107|        return cursor + timedelta(hours=1)
   108|    if bucket == "day":
   109|        return cursor + timedelta(days=1)
   110|    if bucket == "week":
   111|        return cursor + timedelta(days=7)
   112|    next_month = cursor.month + 1
   113|    next_year = cursor.year
   114|    if next_month > 12:
   115|        next_month = 1
   116|        next_year += 1
   117|    return cursor.replace(year=next_year, month=next_month, day=1)
   118|
   119|
   120|def _build_buckets(range_spec: RangeSpec) -> list[datetime]:
   121|    cursor = _bucket_start(range_spec.start, range_spec.bucket)
   122|    buckets: list[datetime] = []
   123|    while cursor <= range_spec.end:
   124|        buckets.append(cursor)
   125|        cursor = _next_bucket(cursor, range_spec.bucket)
   126|    return buckets
   127|
   128|
   129|def _series_from_mapping(
   130|    range_spec: RangeSpec,
   131|    mapping: dict[datetime, float],
   132|) -> DashboardRangeSeries:
   133|    points = [
   134|        DashboardSeriesPoint(period=bucket, value=float(mapping.get(bucket, 0)))
   135|        for bucket in _build_buckets(range_spec)
   136|    ]
   137|    return DashboardRangeSeries(
   138|        range=range_spec.key,
   139|        bucket=range_spec.bucket,
   140|        points=points,
   141|    )
   142|
   143|
   144|def _wip_series_from_mapping(
   145|    range_spec: RangeSpec,
   146|    mapping: dict[datetime, dict[str, int]],
   147|) -> DashboardWipRangeSeries:
   148|    points: list[DashboardWipPoint] = []
   149|    for bucket in _build_buckets(range_spec):
   150|        values = mapping.get(bucket, {})
   151|        points.append(
   152|            DashboardWipPoint(
   153|                period=bucket,
   154|                inbox=values.get("inbox", 0),
   155|                in_progress=values.get("in_progress", 0),
   156|                review=values.get("review", 0),
   157|                done=values.get("done", 0),
   158|            ),
   159|        )
   160|    return DashboardWipRangeSeries(
   161|        range=range_spec.key,
   162|        bucket=range_spec.bucket,
   163|        points=points,
   164|    )

   167|async def _query_throughput(
   168|    session: AsyncSession,
   169|    range_spec: RangeSpec,
   170|    board_ids: list[UUID],
   171|) -> DashboardRangeSeries:
   172|    bucket_col = func.date_trunc(range_spec.bucket, Task.updated_at).label("bucket")
   173|    statement = (
   174|        select(bucket_col, func.count())
   175|        .where(col(Task.status) == "done")
   176|        .where(col(Task.updated_at) >= range_spec.start)
   177|        .where(col(Task.updated_at) <= range_spec.end)
   178|    )
   179|    if not board_ids:
   180|        return _series_from_mapping(range_spec, {})
   181|    statement = (
   182|        statement.where(col(Task.board_id).in_(board_ids)).group_by(bucket_col).order_by(bucket_col)
   183|    )
   184|    results = (await session.exec(statement)).all()
   185|    mapping = {row[0]: float(row[1]) for row in results}
   186|    return _series_from_mapping(range_spec, mapping)
   187|
   188|
   189|async def _query_cycle_time(
   190|    session: AsyncSession,
   191|    range_spec: RangeSpec,
   192|    board_ids: list[UUID],
   193|) -> DashboardRangeSeries:
   194|    bucket_col = func.date_trunc(range_spec.bucket, Task.updated_at).label("bucket")
   195|    in_progress = sql_cast(Task.in_progress_at, DateTime)
   196|    duration_hours = func.extract("epoch", Task.updated_at - in_progress) / 3600.0
   197|    statement = (
   198|        select(bucket_col, func.avg(duration_hours))
   199|        .where(col(Task.status) == "review")
   200|        .where(col(Task.in_progress_at).is_not(None))
   201|        .where(col(Task.updated_at) >= range_spec.start)
   202|        .where(col(Task.updated_at) <= range_spec.end)
   203|    )
   204|    if not board_ids:
   205|        return _series_from_mapping(range_spec, {})
   206|    statement = (
   207|        statement.where(col(Task.board_id).in_(board_ids)).group_by(bucket_col).order_by(bucket_col)
   208|    )
   209|    results = (await session.exec(statement)).all()
   210|    mapping = {row[0]: float(row[1] or 0) for row in results}
   211|    return _series_from_mapping(range_spec, mapping)
   212|
   213|
   214|async def _query_error_rate(
   215|    session: AsyncSession,
   216|    range_spec: RangeSpec,
   217|    board_ids: list[UUID],
   218|) -> DashboardRangeSeries:
   219|    bucket_col = func.date_trunc(
   220|        range_spec.bucket,
   221|        ActivityEvent.created_at,
   222|    ).label("bucket")
   223|    error_case = case(
   224|        (
   225|            col(ActivityEvent.event_type).like(ERROR_EVENT_PATTERN),
   226|            1,
   227|        ),
   228|        else_=0,
   229|    )
   230|    statement = (
   231|        select(bucket_col, func.sum(error_case), func.count())
   232|        .join(Task, col(ActivityEvent.task_id) == col(Task.id))
   233|        .where(col(ActivityEvent.created_at) >= range_spec.start)
   234|        .where(col(ActivityEvent.created_at) <= range_spec.end)
   235|    )
   236|    if not board_ids:
   237|        return _series_from_mapping(range_spec, {})
   238|    statement = (
   239|        statement.where(col(Task.board_id).in_(board_ids)).group_by(bucket_col).order_by(bucket_col)
   240|    )
   241|    results = (await session.exec(statement)).all()
   242|    mapping: dict[datetime, float] = {}
   243|    for bucket, errors, total in results:
   244|        total_count = float(total or 0)
   245|        error_count = float(errors or 0)
   246|        rate = (error_count / total_count) * 100 if total_count > 0 else 0.0
   247|        mapping[bucket] = rate
   248|    return _series_from_mapping(range_spec, mapping)
   249|
   250|
   251|async def _query_wip(
   252|    session: AsyncSession,
   253|    range_spec: RangeSpec,
   254|    board_ids: list[UUID],
   255|) -> DashboardWipRangeSeries:
   256|    if not board_ids:
   257|        return _wip_series_from_mapping(range_spec, {})
   258|
   259|    inbox_bucket_col = func.date_trunc(range_spec.bucket, Task.created_at).label("inbox_bucket")
   260|    inbox_statement = (
   261|        select(inbox_bucket_col, func.count())
   262|        .where(col(Task.status) == "inbox")
   263|        .where(col(Task.created_at) >= range_spec.start)
   264|        .where(col(Task.created_at) <= range_spec.end)
   265|        .where(col(Task.board_id).in_(board_ids))
   266|        .group_by(inbox_bucket_col)
   267|        .order_by(inbox_bucket_col)
   268|    )
   269|    inbox_results = (await session.exec(inbox_statement)).all()
   270|
   271|    status_bucket_col = func.date_trunc(range_spec.bucket, Task.updated_at).label("status_bucket")
   272|    progress_case = case((col(Task.status) == "in_progress", 1), else_=0)
   273|    review_case = case((col(Task.status) == "review", 1), else_=0)
   274|    done_case = case((col(Task.status) == "done", 1), else_=0)
   275|    status_statement = (
   276|        select(
   277|            status_bucket_col,
   278|            func.sum(progress_case),
   279|            func.sum(review_case),
   280|            func.sum(done_case),
   281|        )
   282|        .where(col(Task.updated_at) >= range_spec.start)
   283|        .where(col(Task.updated_at) <= range_spec.end)
   284|        .where(col(Task.board_id).in_(board_ids))
   285|        .group_by(status_bucket_col)
   286|        .order_by(status_bucket_col)
   287|    )
   288|    status_results = (await session.exec(status_statement)).all()
   289|
   290|    mapping: dict[datetime, dict[str, int]] = {}
   291|    for bucket, inbox in inbox_results:
   292|        values = mapping.setdefault(bucket, {})
   293|        values["inbox"] = int(inbox or 0)
   294|    for bucket, in_progress, review, done in status_results:
   295|        values = mapping.setdefault(bucket, {})
   296|        values["in_progress"] = int(in_progress or 0)
   297|        values["review"] = int(review or 0)
   298|        values["done"] = int(done or 0)
   299|    return _wip_series_from_mapping(range_spec, mapping)
   300|
   301|
   302|async def _median_cycle_time_for_range(
   303|    session: AsyncSession,
   304|    range_spec: RangeSpec,
   305|    board_ids: list[UUID],
   306|) -> float | None:
   307|    in_progress = sql_cast(Task.in_progress_at, DateTime)
   308|    duration_hours = func.extract("epoch", Task.updated_at - in_progress) / 3600.0
   309|    statement = (
   310|        select(func.percentile_cont(0.5).within_group(duration_hours))
   311|        .where(col(Task.status) == "review")
   312|        .where(col(Task.in_progress_at).is_not(None))
   313|        .where(col(Task.updated_at) >= range_spec.start)
   314|        .where(col(Task.updated_at) <= range_spec.end)
   315|    )
   316|    if not board_ids:
   317|        return None
   318|    statement = statement.where(col(Task.board_id).in_(board_ids))
   319|    value = (await session.exec(statement)).one_or_none()
   320|    if value is None:
   321|        return None
   322|    if isinstance(value, tuple):
   323|        value = value[0]
   324|    if value is None:
   325|        return None
   326|    return float(value)
   327|
   328|
   329|async def _error_rate_kpi(
   330|    session: AsyncSession,
   331|    range_spec: RangeSpec,
   332|    board_ids: list[UUID],
   333|) -> float:
   334|    error_case = case(
   335|        (
   336|            col(ActivityEvent.event_type).like(ERROR_EVENT_PATTERN),
   337|            1,
   338|        ),
   339|        else_=0,
   340|    )
   341|    statement = (
   342|        select(func.sum(error_case), func.count())
   343|        .join(Task, col(ActivityEvent.task_id) == col(Task.id))
   344|        .where(col(ActivityEvent.created_at) >= range_spec.start)
   345|        .where(col(ActivityEvent.created_at) <= range_spec.end)
   346|    )
   347|    if not board_ids:
   348|        return 0.0
   349|    statement = statement.where(col(Task.board_id).in_(board_ids))
   350|    result = (await session.exec(statement)).one_or_none()
   351|    if result is None:
   352|        return 0.0
   353|    errors, total = result
   354|    total_count = float(total or 0)
   355|    error_count = float(errors or 0)
   356|    return (error_count / total_count) * 100 if total_count > 0 else 0.0
   357|
   358|
   359|async def _active_agents(
   360|    session: AsyncSession,
   361|    range_spec: RangeSpec,
   362|    board_ids: list[UUID],
   363|) -> int:
   364|    statement = select(func.count()).where(
   365|        col(Agent.last_seen_at).is_not(None),
   366|        col(Agent.last_seen_at) >= range_spec.start,
   367|        col(Agent.last_seen_at) <= range_spec.end,
   368|    )
   369|    if not board_ids:
   370|        return 0
   371|    statement = statement.where(col(Agent.board_id).in_(board_ids))
   372|    result = (await session.exec(statement)).one()
   373|    return int(result)
   374|
   375|
   376|async def _task_status_counts(
   377|    session: AsyncSession,
   378|    board_ids: list[UUID],
   379|) -> dict[str, int]:
   380|    if not board_ids:
   381|        return {
   382|            "inbox": 0,
   383|            "in_progress": 0,
   384|            "review": 0,
   385|            "done": 0,
   386|        }
   387|    statement = (
   388|        select(col(Task.status), func.count())
   389|        .where(col(Task.board_id).in_(board_ids))
   390|        .group_by(col(Task.status))
   391|    )
   392|    results = (await session.exec(statement)).all()
   393|    counts = {
   394|        "inbox": 0,
   395|        "in_progress": 0,
   396|        "review": 0,
   397|        "done": 0,
   398|    }
   399|    for status_value, total in results:
   400|        key = str(status_value)
   401|        if key in counts:
   402|            counts[key] = int(total or 0)
   403|    return counts
   404|
   405|
   406|async def _pending_approvals_snapshot(
   407|    session: AsyncSession,
   408|    board_ids: list[UUID],
   409|    *,
   410|    limit: int = 10,
   411|) -> DashboardPendingApprovals:
   412|    if not board_ids:
   413|        return DashboardPendingApprovals(total=0, items=[])
   414|
   415|    total_statement = (
   416|        select(func.count(col(Approval.id)))
   417|        .where(col(Approval.board_id).in_(board_ids))
   418|        .where(col(Approval.status) == "pending")
   419|    )
   420|    total = int((await session.exec(total_statement)).one() or 0)
   421|    if total == 0:
   422|        return DashboardPendingApprovals(total=0, items=[])
   423|
   424|    rows = (
   425|        await session.exec(
   426|            select(Approval, Board, Task)
   427|            .join(Board, col(Board.id) == col(Approval.board_id))
   428|            .outerjoin(Task, col(Task.id) == col(Approval.task_id))
   429|            .where(col(Approval.board_id).in_(board_ids))
   430|            .where(col(Approval.status) == "pending")
   431|            .order_by(col(Approval.created_at).desc())
   432|            .limit(limit)
   433|        )
   434|    ).all()
   435|
   436|    items = [
   437|        DashboardPendingApproval(
   438|            approval_id=approval.id,
   439|            board_id=approval.board_id,
   440|            board_name=board.name,
   441|            action_type=approval.action_type,
   442|            confidence=float(approval.confidence),
   443|            created_at=approval.created_at,
   444|            task_title=task.title if task is not None else None,
   445|        )
   446|        for approval, board, task in rows
   447|    ]
   448|    return DashboardPendingApprovals(total=total, items=items)
   449|
   450|
   451|async def _resolve_dashboard_board_ids(
   452|    session: AsyncSession,
   453|    *,
   454|    ctx: OrganizationContext,
   455|    board_id: UUID | None,
   456|    group_id: UUID | None,
   457|) -> list[UUID]:
   458|    board_ids = await list_accessible_board_ids(session, member=ctx.member, write=False)
   459|    if not board_ids:
   460|        return []
   461|    allowed = set(board_ids)
   462|
   463|    if board_id is not None and board_id not in allowed:
   464|        raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_403_FORBIDDEN)
   465|
   466|    if group_id is None:
   467|        return [board_id] if board_id is not None else board_ids
   468|
   469|    group_board_ids = list(
   470|        await session.exec(
   471|            select(Board.id)
   472|            .where(col(Board.organization_id) == ctx.member.organization_id)
   473|            .where(col(Board.board_group_id) == group_id)
   474|            .where(col(Board.id).in_(board_ids)),
   475|        ),
   476|    )
   477|    if board_id is not None:
   478|        return [board_id] if board_id in set(group_board_ids) else []
   479|    return group_board_ids
   480|
   481|
   482|@router.get("/dashboard", response_model=DashboardMetrics)
   483|async def dashboard_metrics(
   484|    range_key: DashboardRangeKey = RANGE_QUERY,
   485|    board_id: UUID | None = BOARD_ID_QUERY,
   486|    group_id: UUID | None = GROUP_ID_QUERY,
   487|    session: AsyncSession = SESSION_DEP,
   488|    ctx: OrganizationContext = ORG_MEMBER_DEP,
   489|) -> DashboardMetrics:

   492|    comparison = _comparison_range(primary)

   145|def _decode_payload(
   146|    raw_body: bytes,
   147|    *,
   148|    content_type: str | None,
   149|) -> dict[str, object] | list[object] | str | int | float | bool | None:
   150|    if not raw_body:
   151|        return {}
   152|
   153|    body_text = raw_body.decode("utf-8", errors="replace")
   154|    normalized_content_type = (content_type or "").lower()
   155|    should_parse_json = "application/json" in normalized_content_type
   156|    if not should_parse_json:
   157|        should_parse_json = body_text.startswith(("{", "[", '"')) or body_text in {"true", "false"}
   158|
   159|    if should_parse_json:
   160|        try:
   161|            parsed = json.loads(body_text)
   162|        except json.JSONDecodeError:
   163|            return body_text
   164|        if isinstance(parsed, (dict, list, str, int, float, bool)) or parsed is None:
   165|            return parsed
   166|    return body_text

   169|def _verify_webhook_signature(
   170|    webhook: BoardWebhook,
   171|    raw_body: bytes,
   172|    request: Request,
   173|) -> None:
   174|    """Verify HMAC-SHA256 signature if the webhook has a secret configured.
   175|
   176|    When a secret is set, the sender must include a valid signature header.
   177|    The header to check is determined by ``webhook.signature_header`` if set,
   178|    otherwise the following well-known headers are tried in order:
   179|      X-Hub-Signature-256  (GitHub-style)
   180|      X-Webhook-Signature
   181|    If no secret is configured, signature verification is skipped entirely.
   182|    """
   183|    if not webhook.secret:
   184|        return
   185|    if webhook.signature_header:
   186|        sig_header = request.headers.get(webhook.signature_header.lower())
   187|    else:
   188|        sig_header = request.headers.get("x-hub-signature-256") or request.headers.get(
   189|            "x-webhook-signature"
   190|        )
   191|    if not sig_header:
   192|        raise HTTPException(
   193|            status_code=status.HTTP_403_FORBIDDEN,
   194|            detail="Missing webhook signature header.",
   195|        )
   196|    sig_value = sig_header
   197|    if sig_value.lower().startswith("sha256="):
   198|        sig_value = sig_value[7:]
   199|    sig_value = sig_value.strip().lower()
   200|    expected = hmac.new(
   201|        webhook.secret.encode("utf-8"),
   202|        raw_body,
   203|        hashlib.sha256,
   204|    ).hexdigest()
   205|    expected = expected.strip().lower()
   206|    if not hmac.compare_digest(sig_value, expected):
   207|        raise HTTPException(
   208|            status_code=status.HTTP_403_FORBIDDEN,
   209|            detail="Invalid webhook signature.",
   210|        )
   211|
   212|
   213|_REDACTED_HEADERS = frozenset(
   214|    {
   215|        "x-hub-signature-256",
   216|        "x-webhook-signature",
   217|        "authorization",
   218|    }
   219|)
   220|
   221|
   222|def _captured_headers(
   223|    request: Request,
   224|    *,
   225|    extra_redacted: str | None = None,
   226|) -> dict[str, str] | None:
   227|    redacted = _REDACTED_HEADERS
   228|    if extra_redacted:
   229|        redacted = redacted | {extra_redacted.lower()}
   230|    captured: dict[str, str] = {}
   231|    for header, value in request.headers.items():
   232|        normalized = header.lower()
   233|        if normalized in redacted:
   234|            continue
   235|        if normalized in {"content-type", "user-agent"} or normalized.startswith("x-"):
   236|            captured[normalized] = value
   237|    return captured or None

   241|    value: dict[str, object] | list[object] | str | int | float | bool | None,
   242|) -> str:
   243|    if isinstance(value, str):
   244|        preview = value
   245|    else:
   246|        try:
   247|            preview = json.dumps(value, indent=2, ensure_ascii=True)
   248|        except TypeError:
   249|            preview = str(value)
   250|    return preview

    54|def _parse_since(value: str | None) -> datetime | None:
    55|    if not value:
    56|        return None
    57|    normalized = value.strip()
    58|    if not normalized:
    59|        return None
    60|    normalized = normalized.replace("Z", "+00:00")
    61|    try:
    62|        parsed = datetime.fromisoformat(normalized)
    63|    except ValueError:
    64|        return None
    65|    if parsed.tzinfo is not None:
    66|        return parsed.astimezone(UTC).replace(tzinfo=None)
    67|    return parsed
    68|
    69|
    70|def _serialize_memory(memory: BoardMemory) -> dict[str, object]:
    71|    return BoardMemoryRead.model_validate(
    72|        memory,
    73|        from_attributes=True,
    74|    ).model_dump(mode="json")

    77|async def _fetch_memory_events(
    78|    session: AsyncSession,
    79|    board_id: UUID,
    80|    since: datetime,
    81|    is_chat: bool | None = None,
    82|) -> list[BoardMemory]:
    83|    statement = (
    84|        BoardMemory.objects.filter_by(board_id=board_id)
    85|        # Old/invalid rows (empty/whitespace-only content) can exist; exclude them to
    86|        # satisfy the NonEmptyStr response schema.
    87|        .filter(func.length(func.trim(col(BoardMemory.content))) > 0)
    88|    )
    89|    if is_chat is not None:
    90|        statement = statement.filter(col(BoardMemory.is_chat) == is_chat)
    91|    statement = statement.filter(col(BoardMemory.created_at) >= since).order_by(
    92|        col(BoardMemory.created_at),
    93|    )
    94|    return await statement.all(session)

    97|async def _send_control_command(
    98|    *,
    99|    session: AsyncSession,
   100|    board: Board,
   101|    actor: ActorContext,
   102|    dispatch: GatewayDispatchService,
   103|    config: GatewayClientConfig,
   104|    command: str,
   105|) -> None:
   106|    pause_targets: list[Agent] = await Agent.objects.filter_by(
   107|        board_id=board.id,
   108|    ).all(
   109|        session,
   110|    )
   111|    for agent in pause_targets:
   112|        if actor.actor_type == "agent" and actor.agent and agent.id == actor.agent.id:
   113|            continue
   114|        if not agent.openclaw_session_id:
   115|            continue
   116|        error = await dispatch.try_send_agent_message(
   117|            session_key=agent.openclaw_session_id,
   118|            config=config,
   119|            agent_name=agent.name,
   120|            message=command,
   121|            deliver=True,
   122|        )
   123|        if error is not None:
   124|            continue

   127|def _chat_targets(
   128|    *,
   129|    agents: list[Agent],
   130|    mentions: set[str],
   131|    actor: ActorContext,
   132|) -> dict[str, Agent]:
   133|    targets: dict[str, Agent] = {}
   134|    for agent in agents:
   135|        if agent.is_board_lead:
   136|            targets[str(agent.id)] = agent
   137|            continue
   138|        if mentions and matches_agent_mention(agent, mentions):
   139|            targets[str(agent.id)] = agent
   140|    if actor.actor_type == "agent" and actor.agent:
   141|        targets.pop(str(actor.agent.id), None)
   142|    return targets

   145|def _actor_display_name(actor: ActorContext) -> str:

    75|def _agent_group_memory_openapi_hints(
    76|    *,
    77|    intent: str,

    79|    routing_examples: list[dict[str, object]],

    85|    side_effects: list[str] | None = None,
    86|) -> dict[str, object]:
    87|    return {
    88|        "x-llm-intent": intent,
    89|        "x-when-to-use": when_to_use,
    90|        "x-when-not-to-use": when_not_to_use
    91|        or [
    92|            "Use a more specific endpoint when targeting a single actor or broadcast scope.",
    93|        ],
    94|        "x-required-actor": required_actor,
    95|        "x-prerequisites": prerequisites
    96|        or [
    97|            "Authenticated actor token",
    98|            "Accessible board context",
    99|        ],
   100|        "x-side-effects": side_effects
   101|        or ["Persisted memory visibility changes may be observable across linked boards."],
   102|        "x-negative-guidance": negative_guidance
   103|        or [
   104|            "Do not use as a replacement for direct task-specific commentary.",
   105|            "Do not assume infinite retention when group storage policies apply.",
   106|        ],
   107|        "x-routing-policy": routing_policy
   108|        or [

   110|            "Prefer narrow board endpoints for one-off lead/agent coordination needs.",
   111|        ],

   116|def _parse_since(value: str | None) -> datetime | None:
   117|    if not value:
   118|        return None
   119|    normalized = value.strip()
   120|    if not normalized:
   121|        return None
   122|    normalized = normalized.replace("Z", "+00:00")
   123|    try:
   124|        parsed = datetime.fromisoformat(normalized)
   125|    except ValueError:
   126|        return None
   127|    if parsed.tzinfo is not None:
   128|        return parsed.astimezone(UTC).replace(tzinfo=None)
   129|    return parsed
   130|

   132|def _serialize_memory(memory: BoardGroupMemory) -> dict[str, object]:
   133|    return BoardGroupMemoryRead.model_validate(
   134|        memory,
   135|        from_attributes=True,
   136|    ).model_dump(mode="json")

   139|async def _fetch_memory_events(
   140|    session: AsyncSession,
   141|    board_group_id: UUID,
   142|    since: datetime,
   143|    is_chat: bool | None = None,
   144|) -> list[BoardGroupMemory]:
   145|    statement = (
   146|        BoardGroupMemory.objects.filter_by(board_group_id=board_group_id)
   147|        # Old/invalid rows (empty/whitespace-only content) can exist; exclude them to
   148|        # satisfy the NonEmptyStr response schema.
   149|        .filter(func.length(func.trim(col(BoardGroupMemory.content))) > 0)
   150|    )
   151|    if is_chat is not None:
   152|        statement = statement.filter(col(BoardGroupMemory.is_chat) == is_chat)
   153|    statement = statement.filter(col(BoardGroupMemory.created_at) >= since).order_by(
   154|        col(BoardGroupMemory.created_at),
   155|    )
   156|    return await statement.all(session)

   159|async def _require_group_access(
   160|    session: AsyncSession,
   161|    *,
   162|    group_id: UUID,
   163|    ctx: OrganizationContext,
   164|    write: bool,
   165|) -> BoardGroup:
   166|    group = await BoardGroup.objects.by_id(group_id).first(session)
   167|    if group is None:
   168|        raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND)
   169|    if group.organization_id != ctx.member.organization_id:
   170|        raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_403_FORBIDDEN)
   171|
   172|    if write and member_all_boards_write(ctx.member):
   173|        return group
   174|    if not write and member_all_boards_read(ctx.member):
   175|        return group
   176|
   177|    board_ids = [
   178|        board.id
   179|        for board in await Board.objects.filter_by(board_group_id=group_id).all(
   180|            session,
   181|        )
   182|    ]
   183|    if not board_ids:
   184|        if is_org_admin(ctx.member):
   185|            return group
   186|        raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_403_FORBIDDEN)
   187|
   188|    allowed_ids = await list_accessible_board_ids(
   189|        session,
   190|        member=ctx.member,
   191|        write=write,
   192|    )
   193|    if not set(board_ids).intersection(set(allowed_ids)):
   194|        raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_403_FORBIDDEN)
   195|    return group

   209|def _group_chat_targets(
   210|    *,
   211|    agents: list[Agent],
   212|    actor: ActorContext,
   213|    is_broadcast: bool,
   214|    mentions: set[str],
   215|) -> dict[str, Agent]:
   216|    targets: dict[str, Agent] = {}
   217|    for agent in agents:
   218|        if not agent.openclaw_session_id:
   219|            continue
   220|        if actor.actor_type == "agent" and actor.agent and agent.id == actor.agent.id:
   221|            continue
   222|        if is_broadcast or agent.is_board_lead:
   223|            targets[str(agent.id)] = agent
   224|            continue
   225|        if mentions and matches_agent_mention(agent, mentions):
   226|            targets[str(agent.id)] = agent
   227|    return targets

   231|    if actor.actor_type == "agent" and actor.agent:
   232|        return actor.agent.name
   233|    if actor.user:
   234|        return actor.user.preferred_name or actor.user.name or "User"
   235|    return "User"

   238|def _group_header(*, is_broadcast: bool, mentioned: bool) -> str:
   239|    if is_broadcast:
   240|        return "GROUP BROADCAST"
   241|    if mentioned:
   242|        return "GROUP CHAT MENTION"
   243|    return "GROUP CHAT"

   259|async def _notify_group_target(
   260|    context: _NotifyGroupContext,

   263|    session_key = agent.openclaw_session_id
   264|    board_id = agent.board_id

   283|        f"POST {context.base_url}/api/v1/boards/{board.id}/group-memory\n"
   284|        'Body: {"content":"...","tags":["chat"]}'
   285|    )
   286|    error = await context.dispatch.try_send_agent_message(
   287|        session_key=session_key,

   292|    if error is not None:

   336|    context = _NotifyGroupContext(

   406|@group_router.post("", response_model=BoardGroupMemoryRead)
   407|async def create_board_group_memory(
   408|    group_id: UUID,
   409|    payload: BoardGroupMemoryCreate,
   410|    session: AsyncSession = SESSION_DEP,
   411|    ctx: OrganizationContext = ORG_MEMBER_DEP,

   418|    tags = set(payload.tags or [])

   420|    mentions = extract_mentions(payload.content)
   421|    should_notify = is_chat or "broadcast" in tags or "all" in mentions
   422|    source = payload.source
   423|    if should_notify and not source:

   170|    """Validate that a skill pack source URL is safe to clone.

   172|    The current implementation is intentionally conservative:

   184|

   188|

   191|

   193|        raise ValueError(
   194|            "Pack source URL must be a GitHub repository URL (https://github.com/<owner>/<repo>)"
   195|        )
   196|
   197|    path = parsed.path.strip("/")
   198|    if not path or path.count("/") < 1:
   199|        raise ValueError(
   200|            "Pack source URL must be a GitHub repository URL (https://github.com/<owner>/<repo>)"
   201|        )
   202|
   203|    try:
   204|        ip = ipaddress.ip_address(host)
   205|    except ValueError:
   206|        return
   207|
   208|    if ip.is_private or ip.is_loopback or ip.is_link_local or ip.is_reserved or ip.is_multicast:

   437|    source_url: str,
   438|    branch: str,
   439|    discovery_warnings: list[str] | None = None,

   445|    try:

   447|            payload = _StreamingJSONReader(fp).read_top_level_entries()
   448|    except OSError as exc:
   449|        raise RuntimeError("unable to read skills_index.json") from exc
   450|    except RuntimeError as exc:

   453|        return None
   454|
   455|    found: dict[str, PackSkillCandidate] = {}
   456|    for entry in _coerce_index_entries(payload):

   484|                        resolved_skill_path = _normalize_repo_path(candidate_path)

   497|

{"content": "     1|"""Tag CRUD endpoints for organization-scoped task categorization."""
     2|
     3|from __future__ import annotations
     4|
     5|from typing import TYPE_CHECKING
     6|from uuid import UUID
     7|
     8|from fastapi import APIRouter, Depends, HTTPException, status
     9|from sqlalchemy import func
    10|from sqlmodel import col, select
    11|
    12|from app.api.deps import require_org_admin, require_org_member
    13|from app.core.time import utcnow
    14|from app.db import crud
    15|from app.db.pagination import paginate
    16|from app.db.session import get_session
    17|from app.models.tag_assignments import TagAssignment
    18|from app.models.tags import Tag
    19|from app.schemas.common import OkResponse
    20|from app.schemas.pagination import DefaultLimitOffsetPage
    21|from app.schemas.tags import TagCreate, TagRead, TagUpdate
    22|from app.services.organizations import OrganizationContext
    23|from app.services.tags import slugify_tag, task_counts_for_tags
    24|
    25|if TYPE_CHECKING:
    26|    from collections.abc import Sequence
    27|
    28|    from fastapi_pagination.limit_offset import LimitOffsetPage
    29|    from sqlmodel.ext.asyncio.session import AsyncSession
    30|
    31|router = APIRouter(prefix="/tags", tags=["tags"])
    32|SESSION_DEP = Depends(get_session)
    33|ORG_MEMBER_DEP = Depends(require_org_member)
    34|ORG_ADMIN_DEP = Depends(require_org_admin)
    35|
    36|
    37|def _normalize_slug(slug: str | None, *, fallback_name: str) -> str:
    38|    source = (slug or "").strip() or fallback_name
    39|    return slugify_tag(source)
    40|
    41|
    42|async def _require_org_tag(
    43|    session: AsyncSession,
    44|    *,
    45|    tag_id: UUID,
    46|    ctx: OrganizationContext,
    47|) -> Tag:
    48|    tag = await Tag.objects.by_id(tag_id).first(session)
    49|    if tag is None:
    50|        raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND)
    51|    if tag.organization_id != ctx.organization.id:
    52|        raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_403_FORBIDDEN)
    53|    return tag
    54|
    55|
    56|async def _ensure_slug_available(
    57|    session: AsyncSession,
    58|    *,
    59|    organization_id: UUID,
    60|    slug: str,
    61|    exclude_tag_id: UUID | None = None,
    62|) -> None:
    63|    existing = await Tag.objects.filter_by(organization_id=organization_id, slug=slug).first(
    64|        session
    65|    )
    66|    if existing is None:
    67|        return
    68|    if exclude_tag_id is not None and existing.id == exclude_tag_id:
    69|        return
    70|    raise HTTPException(
    71|        status_code=status.HTTP_409_CONFLICT,
    72|        detail="Tag slug already exists in this organization.",
    73|    )
    74|
    75|
    76|async def _tag_read_page(
    77|    *,
    78|    session: AsyncSession,
    79|    items: Sequence[Tag],
    80|) -> list[TagRead]:
    81|    if not items:
    82|        return []
    83|    counts = await task_counts_for_tags(
    84|        session,
    85|        tag_ids=[item.id for item in items],
    86|    )
    87|    return [
    88|        TagRead.model_validate(item, from_attributes=True).model_copy(
    89|            update={"task_count": counts.get(item.id, 0)},
    90|        )
    91|        for item in items
    92|    ]
    93|
    94|
    95|@router.get("", response_model=DefaultLimitOffsetPage[TagRead])
    96|async def list_tags(
    97|    session: AsyncSession = SESSION_DEP,
    98|    ctx: OrganizationContext = ORG_MEMBER_DEP,
    99|) -> LimitOffsetPage[TagRead]:
   100|    """List tags for the active organization."""
   101|    statement = (
   102|        select(Tag)
   103|        .where(col(Tag.organization_id) == ctx.organization.id)
   104|        .order_by(func.lower(col(Tag.name)).asc(), col(Tag.created_at).asc())
   105|    )
   106|
   107|    async def _transform(items: Sequence[object]) -> Sequence[object]:
   108|        tags: list[Tag] = []
   109|        for item in items:
   110|            if not isinstance(item, Tag):
   111|                msg = "Expected Tag items from paginated query"
   112|                raise TypeError(msg)
   113|            tags.append(item)
   114|        return await _tag_read_page(session=session, items=tags)
   115|
   116|    return await paginate(session, statement, transformer=_transform)
   117|
   118|
   119|@router.post("", response_model=TagRead)
   120|async def create_tag(
   121|    payload: TagCreate,
   122|    session: AsyncSession = SESSION_DEP,
   123|    ctx: OrganizationContext = ORG_ADMIN_DEP,
   124|) -> TagRead:
   125|    """Create a tag within the active organization."""
   126|    slug = _normalize_slug(payload.slug, fallback_name=payload.name)
   127|    await _ensure_slug_available(
   128|        session,
   129|        organization_id=ctx.organization.id,
   130|        slug=slug,
   131|    )
   132|    tag = await crud.create(
   133|        session,
   134|        Tag,
   135|        organization_id=ctx.organization.id,
   136|        name=payload.name,
   137|        slug=slug,
   138|        color=payload.color,
   139|        description=payload.description,
   140|    )
   141|    return TagRead.model_validate(tag, from_attributes=True)
   142|
   143|
   144|@router.get("/{tag_id}", response_model=TagRead)
   145|async def get_tag(
   146|    tag_id: UUID,
   147|    session: AsyncSession = SESSION_DEP,
   148|    ctx: OrganizationContext = ORG_MEMBER_DEP,
   149|) -> TagRead:
   150|    """Get a single tag in the active organization."""
   151|    tag = await _require_org_tag(
   152|        session,
   153|        tag_id=tag_id,
   154|        ctx=ctx,
   155|    )
   156|    count = (
   157|        await session.exec(
   158|            select(func.count(col(TagAssignment.task_id))).where(
   159|                col(TagAssignment.tag_id) == tag.id,
   160|            ),
   161|        )
   162|    ).one()
   163|    return TagRead.model_validate(tag, from_attributes=True).model_copy(
   164|        update={"task_count": int(count or 0)},
   165|    )
   166|
   167|
   168|@router.patch("/{tag_id}", response_model=TagRead)
   169|async def update_tag(
   170|    tag_id: UUID,
   171|    payload: TagUpdate,
   172|    session: AsyncSession = SESSION_DEP,
   173|    ctx: OrganizationContext = ORG_ADMIN_DEP,
   174|) -> TagRead:
   175|    """Update a tag in the active organization."""
   176|    tag = await _require_org_tag(
   177|        session,
   178|        tag_id=tag_id,
   179|        ctx=ctx,
   180|    )
   181|    updates = payload.model_dump(exclude_unset=True)
   182|
   183|    if "slug" in payload.model_fields_set:
   184|        updates["slug"] = _normalize_slug(
   185|            updates.get("slug"),
   186|            fallback_name=str(updates.get("name") or tag.name),
   187|        )
   188|    if "slug" in updates and isinstance(updates["slug"], str):
   189|        await _ensure_slug_available(
   190|            session,
   191|            organization_id=ctx.organization.id,
   192|            slug=updates["slug"],
   193|            exclude_tag_id=tag.id,
   194|        )
   195|    updates["updated_at"] = utcnow()
   196|    updated = await crud.patch(session, tag, updates)
   197|    return TagRead.model_validate(updated, from_attributes=True)
   198|
   199|
   200|@router.delete("/{tag_id}", response_model=OkResponse)
   201|async def delete_tag(
   202|    tag_id: UUID,
   203|    session: AsyncSession = SESSION_DEP,
   204|    ctx: OrganizationContext = ORG_ADMIN_DEP,
   205|) -> OkResponse:
   206|    """Delete a tag and remove all associated tag links."""
   207|    tag = await _require_org_tag(
   208|        session,
   209|        tag_id=tag_id,
   210|        ctx=ctx,
   211|    )
   212|    await crud.delete_where(
   213|        session,
   214|        TagAssignment,
   215|        col(TagAssignment.tag_id) == tag.id,
   216|        commit=False,
   217|    )
   218|    await session.delete(tag)
   219|    await session.commit()
   220|    return OkResponse()
   221|", "total_lines": 220, "file_size": 6610, "truncated": false, "is_binary": false, "is_image": false}

   202|    """Return the authenticated user's current profile payload."""
   203|    if auth.actor_type != "user" or auth.user is None:
   204|        raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_401_UNAUTHORIZED)
   205|    return UserRead.model_validate(auth.user)

   208|@router.patch("/me", response_model=UserRead)
   209|async def update_me(
   210|    payload: UserUpdate,
   211|    session: AsyncSession = SESSION_DEP,
   212|    auth: AuthContext = AUTH_CONTEXT_DEP,
   213|) -> UserRead:
   214|    """Apply partial profile updates for the authenticated user."""
   215|    if auth.actor_type != "user" or auth.user is None:
   216|        raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_401_UNAUTHORIZED)
   217|    updates = payload.model_dump(exclude_unset=True)
   218|    user: User = auth.user
   219|    for key, value in updates.items():
   220|        setattr(user, key, value)
   221|    session.add(user)
   222|    await session.commit()
   223|    await session.refresh(user)
   224|    return UserRead.model_validate(user)
   225|
   226|
   227|@router.delete("/me", response_model=OkResponse)
   228|async def delete_me(
   229|    session: AsyncSession = SESSION_DEP,
   230|    auth: AuthContext = AUTH_CONTEXT_DEP,
   231|) -> OkResponse:
   232|    """Delete the authenticated account and any personal-only organizations."""
   233|    if auth.actor_type != "user" or auth.user is None:
   234|        raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_401_UNAUTHORIZED)
   235|
   236|    user: User = auth.user
   237|    await delete_clerk_user(user.clerk_user_id)
   238|    memberships = await OrganizationMember.objects.filter_by(user_id=user.id).all(session)
   239|
   240|    await crud.update_where(
   241|        session,
   242|        OrganizationInvite,
   243|        col(OrganizationInvite.created_by_user_id) == user.id,
   244|        created_by_user_id=None,
   245|        commit=False,
   246|    )
   247|    await crud.update_where(
   248|        session,
   249|        OrganizationInvite,
   250|        col(OrganizationInvite.accepted_by_user_id) == user.id,
   251|        accepted_by_user_id=None,
   252|        commit=False,
   253|    )
   254|    await crud.update_where(
   255|        session,
   256|        Task,
   257|        col(Task.created_by_user_id) == user.id,
   258|        created_by_user_id=None,
   259|        commit=False,
   260|    )
   261|
   262|    for member in memberships:
   263|        org_members = await OrganizationMember.objects.filter_by(
   264|            organization_id=member.organization_id,
   265|        ).all(session)
   266|        if len(org_members) <= 1:
   267|            await _delete_organization_tree(
   268|                session,
   269|                organization_id=member.organization_id,
   270|            )
   271|            continue
   272|        await crud.delete_where(
   273|            session,
   274|            OrganizationBoardAccess,
   275|            col(OrganizationBoardAccess.organization_member_id) == member.id,
   276|            commit=False,
   277|        )
   278|        await crud.delete_where(
   279|            session,
   280|            OrganizationMember,
   281|            col(OrganizationMember.id) == member.id,
   282|            commit=False,
   283|        )
   284|
   285|    await crud.delete_where(
   286|        session,
   287|        User,
   288|        col(User.id) == user.id,
   289|        commit=False,
   290|    )
   291|    await session.commit()
   292|    return OkResponse()

    79|        return None

    89|def _normalize_autonomy_token(value: object) -> str | None:
    90|    if not isinstance(value, str):
    91|        return None
    92|    text = value.strip().lower()
    93|    if not text:
    94|        return None
    95|    return text.replace("_", "-")
    96|
    97|
    98|def _is_fully_autonomous_choice(value: object) -> bool:
    99|    token = _normalize_autonomy_token(value)
   100|    if token is None:
   101|        return False
   102|    if token in {"autonomous", "fully-autonomous", "full-autonomy"}:
   103|        return True
   104|    return "autonom" in token and "fully" in token
   105|
   106|
   107|def _require_approval_for_done_from_draft(draft_goal: object) -> bool:
   108|    """Enable done-approval gate unless onboarding selected fully autonomous mode."""
   109|    if not isinstance(draft_goal, dict):
   110|        return True
   111|    raw_lead = draft_goal.get("lead_agent")
   112|    if not isinstance(raw_lead, dict):
   113|        return True
   114|    if _is_fully_autonomous_choice(raw_lead.get("autonomy_level")):
   115|        return False
   116|    raw_identity_profile = raw_lead.get("identity_profile")
   117|    if isinstance(raw_identity_profile, dict):
   118|        for key in ("autonomy_level", "autonomy", "mode"):
   119|            if _is_fully_autonomous_choice(raw_identity_profile.get(key)):
   120|                return False
   121|    return True

   124|def _apply_user_profile(
   125|    auth: AuthContext,
   126|    profile: BoardOnboardingUserProfile | None,
   127|) -> bool:
   128|    if auth.user is None or profile is None:
   129|        return False
   130|
   131|    changed = False
   132|    if profile.preferred_name is not None:
   133|        auth.user.preferred_name = profile.preferred_name
   134|        changed = True
   135|    if profile.pronouns is not None:
   136|        auth.user.pronouns = profile.pronouns
   137|        changed = True
   138|    if profile.timezone is not None:
   139|        auth.user.timezone = profile.timezone
   140|        changed = True
   141|    if profile.notes is not None:
   142|        auth.user.notes = profile.notes
   143|        changed = True
   144|    if profile.context is not None:
   145|        auth.user.context = profile.context
   146|        changed = True
   147|    return changed

   169|
   170|    return LeadAgentOptions(

    51|async def _board_ids_by_definition_id(
    52|    *,
    53|    session: AsyncSession,
    54|    definition_ids: list[UUID],
    55|) -> dict[UUID, list[UUID]]:
    56|    if not definition_ids:
    57|        return {}
    58|    rows = (
    59|        await session.exec(
    60|            select(
    61|                col(BoardTaskCustomField.task_custom_field_definition_id),
    62|                col(BoardTaskCustomField.board_id),
    63|            ).where(
    64|                col(BoardTaskCustomField.task_custom_field_definition_id).in_(definition_ids),
    65|            ),
    66|        )
    67|    ).all()
    68|    board_ids_by_definition_id: dict[UUID, list[UUID]] = {
    69|        definition_id: [] for definition_id in definition_ids
    70|    }
    71|    for definition_id, board_id in rows:
    72|        board_ids_by_definition_id.setdefault(definition_id, []).append(board_id)
    73|    for definition_id in board_ids_by_definition_id:
    74|        board_ids_by_definition_id[definition_id].sort(key=str)
    75|    return board_ids_by_definition_id

    90|    valid_board_ids = set(

I now have a comprehensive understanding of the entire backend. Here is my complete catalog:

---

COMPREHENSIVE BACKEND CATALOG - MISSION CONTROL APP

== DATA MODELS (28 tables) ==

CORE ENTITIES:
- Organization: id, name, created_at, updated_at (top-level tenant)
- User: id, clerk_user_id, email, name, preferred_name, pronouns, timezone, notes, context, is_super_admin, active_organization_id
- OrganizationMember: id, organization_id, user_id, role (owner/admin/member), all_boards_read, all_boards_write
- OrganizationInvite: organization_id, invited_email, token, role, all_boards_read/write, created_by_user_id, accepted_by_user_id, accepted_at
- OrganizationBoardAccess: organization_member_id, board_id (per-board read/write)
- OrganizationInviteBoardAccess: organization_invite_id, board_id

BOARD HIERARCHY:
- BoardGroup: id, organization_id, name, slug, description (logical grouping of boards)
- Board: id, organization_id, name, slug, description, gateway_id, board_group_id, board_type (goal/general), objective, success_metrics (JSON), target_date, goal_confirmed, goal_source, require_approval_for_done, require_review_before_done, comment_required_for_review, block_status_changes_with_pending_approval, only_lead_can_change_status, max_agents

TASK SYSTEM:
- Task: id, board_id, title, description, status (inbox/in_progress/review/done), priority, due_at, in_progress_at, previous_in_progress_at, created_by_user_id, assigned_agent_id, auto_created, auto_reason
- TaskDependency: board_id, task_id, depends_on_task_id (DAG)
- TaskFingerprint: board_id (dedup)
- TaskCustomFieldDefinition: organization_id, field_key, label, field_type, ui_visibility, validation_regex, description, required, default_value
- BoardTaskCustomField: board_id, task_custom_field_definition_id (links definitions to boards)
- TaskCustomFieldValue: task values for custom fields

AGENTS:
- Agent: id, board_id (null=main agent), gateway_id, name, status (provisioning/online/offline/etc), openclaw_session_id, agent_token_hash, heartbeat_config (JSON), identity_profile (JSON), identity_template, soul_template, is_board_lead, last_seen_at, lifecycle_generation, wake_attempts, provision_requested_at, provision_confirm_token_hash, provision_action, delete_requested_at

APPROVALS:
- Approval: id, board_id, task_id, agent_id, action_type, payload (JSON), confidence (float), rubric_scores (JSON), status (pending/approved/rejected), resolved_at
- ApprovalTaskLink: approval_id, task_id (many-to-many)

GATEWAY:
- Gateway: id, organization_id, name, url, token, disable_device_pairing, workspace_root, allow_insecure_tls

MEMORY:
- BoardMemory: id, board_id, content, tags (JSON), is_chat, source
- BoardGroupMemory: id, board_group_id, content, tags (JSON), is_chat, source

WEBHOOKS:
- BoardWebhook: id, board_id, agent_id, description, enabled, secret, signature_header
- BoardWebhookPayload: id, board_id, webhook_id, payload (JSON), received_at, headers

TAGS:
- Tag: id, organization_id, name, slug, color, description
- TagAssignment: tag_id, task_id

ACTIVITY:
- ActivityEvent: id, event_type, message, task_id, agent_id, board_id, created_at

SKILLS:
- MarketplaceSkill: id, organization_id, name, description, category, risk, source, source_url, metadata
- SkillPack: id, organization_id, name, description, source_url, branch, metadata
- GatewayInstalledSkill: id, gateway_id, skill_id

ONBOARDING:
- BoardOnboardingSession: board_id, session_key, status, messages (JSON), draft_goal (JSON)

== API ENDPOINTS (all under /api/v1) ==

HEALTH:
- GET /health - Liveness probe
- GET /healthz - Liveness alias
- GET /readyz - Readiness probe

AUTH:
- POST /auth/bootstrap - Resolve caller identity, return UserRead

USERS:
- GET /users/me - Get authenticated user profile
- PATCH /users/me - Update authenticated user profile
- DELETE /users/me - Delete authenticated account + personal orgs

ORGANIZATIONS:
- POST /organizations - Create org (caller becomes owner)
- GET /organizations/me/list - List user's organizations
- PATCH /organizations/me/active - Set active organization
- GET /organizations/me - Get active organization
- DELETE /organizations/me - Delete active org (owner only) + cascade
- GET /organizations/me/member - Get caller's membership record
- GET /organizations/me/members - List org members (paginated)
- GET /organizations/me/members/{member_id} - Get specific member
- PATCH /organizations/me/members/{member_id} - Update member role
- PUT /organizations/me/members/{member_id}/access - Update board-level access
- DELETE /organizations/me/members/{member_id} - Remove member
- GET /organizations/me/invites - List pending invites
- POST /organizations/me/invites - Create invite
- DELETE /organizations/me/invites/{invite_id} - Revoke invite
- POST /organizations/invites/accept - Accept invite by token

GATEWAYS (gateway.py - session inspection):
- GET /gateways/status - Gateway connectivity status
- GET /gateways/sessions - List gateway sessions
- GET /gateways/sessions/{session_id} - Get specific session
- GET /gateways/sessions/{session_id}/history - Session chat history
- POST /gateways/sessions/{session_id}/message - Send message into session
- GET /gateways/commands - Protocol methods/events reference

GATEWAYS (gateways.py - CRUD):
- GET /gateways - List gateways (org admin)
- POST /gateways - Create gateway + provision main agent
- GET /gateways/{gateway_id} - Get gateway
- PATCH /gateways/{gateway_id} - Update gateway + refresh main agent
- POST /gateways/{gateway_id}/templates/sync - Sync templates (reset sessions, rotate tokens, etc)
- DELETE /gateways/{gateway_id} - Delete gateway + cleanup

AGENTS:
- GET /agents - List agents (paginated, filterable by board_id/gateway_id)
- GET /agents/stream - SSE stream of agent updates
- POST /agents - Create/provision agent
- GET /agents/{agent_id} - Get agent
- PATCH /agents/{agent_id} - Update agent (optionally force reprovision)
- POST /agents/{agent_id}/heartbeat - Record heartbeat for specific agent
- POST /agents/heartbeat - Heartbeat or create (upsert)
- DELETE /agents/{agent_id} - Delete agent

BOARD GROUPS:
- GET /board-groups - List board groups
- POST /board-groups - Create board group
- GET /board-groups/{group_id} - Get board group
- GET /board-groups/{group_id}/snapshot - Cross-board snapshot
- POST /board-groups/{group_id}/heartbeat - Apply heartbeat config to group agents
- PATCH /board-groups/{group_id} - Update board group
- DELETE /board-groups/{group_id} - Delete board group

BOARDS:

== KEY BUSINESS LOGIC ==

HIERARCHY: Organization > Gateway > Board Group > Board > Tasks/Agents/Approvals

AGENT ROLES:
- Main Agent (board_id=null): Gateway-level orchestrator, can message/broadcast to board leads
- Board Lead (is_board_lead=true): Manages a board, creates/assigns tasks, nudges workers, creates agents
- Worker Agent: Executes tasks, posts comments, transitions status

TASK LIFECYCLE: inbox -> in_progress -> review -> done
- Dependency DAG: tasks can depend on others; blocked tasks can't transition if deps incomplete
- When a dependency reopens, dependent tasks auto-reset to inbox
- Board rules: require_approval_for_done, require_review_before_done, comment_required_for_review, block_status_changes_with_pending_approval, only_lead_can_change_status

APPROVAL WORKFLOW:
- Agents create approvals for risky/low-confidence actions
- Users approve/reject via PATCH
- Each task can have only one pending approval at a time
- Resolution notifies the board lead agent via gateway
- If board has require_approval_for_done, tasks can only be done when linked approval is approved

AGENT HEARTBEAT:
- Agents periodically call heartbeat to report liveness
- heartbeat_config has "every" interval and "target" setting
- Board group heartbeat applies config across all agents in a group
- Syncs heartbeat settings to gateway

GATEWAY COORDINATION:
- GatewayCoordinationService: nudge agents, ask-user escalation, message/broadcast to leads
- GatewayDispatchService: send messages to agent sessions via gateway RPC
- OpenClawGatewayProvisioner: sync heartbeats, templates, sessions

BOARD MEMORY + CHAT:
- Dual-purpose: is_chat=false for durable context, is_chat=true for board chat
- Chat mentions (@agent) route messages to specific agents
- /pause and /resume are special control commands broadcast to all board agents
- Group memory spans all boards in a group, with @mentions and broadcast tags

WEBHOOK INGESTION:
- External services POST to board webhook endpoints
- HMAC-SHA256 signature verification when secret is set
- Payloads stored, board memory entry created, lead agent notified
- Rate-limited

ONBOARDING FLOW:
- User starts onboarding -> gateway agent asks 6-10 questions
- Agent sends questions via API, user answers via UI
- Agent sends completion payload with board config + lead agent preferences
- User confirms -> board updated, lead agent provisioned

SKILLS MARKETPLACE:
- Skills from git repos (skill packs) or direct URL
- Install/uninstall to gateways
- Sync writes skill files to gateway workspace

METRICS DASHBOARD:
- Throughput (tasks completed), cycle time, error rate, WIP breakdown
- Time-series with configurable range (24h to 1y) and comparison periods
- Pending approvals snapshot

== SERVICES (key) ==

- openclaw/provisioning.py & provisioning_db.py: Agent lifecycle (create, update, heartbeat, delete, ensure board lead)
- openclaw/coordination_service.py: Gateway-level coordination (nudge, ask-user, lead messaging)
- openclaw/gateway_dispatch.py: Send messages to agent sessions
- openclaw/gateway_rpc.py: Gateway protocol client
- openclaw/session_service.py: Gateway session management
- openclaw/onboarding_service.py: Onboarding message dispatch
- activity_log.py: record_activity() for audit trail
- board_lifecycle.py: Board deletion cascade
- board_snapshot.py & board_group_snapshot.py: View model builders
- task_dependencies.py: Dependency DAG management
- tags.py: Tag assignment management
- approval_task_links.py: Many-to-many approval-task linking
- webhooks/dispatch.py & queue.py: Webhook delivery
- lead_policy.py: Lead agent authorization policies
- organizations.py: Multi-tenant organization context, board access filtering, invite flows
